Class DRDesignChart

java.lang.Object
ch.unibas.medizin.dynamicreports.design.base.component.DRDesignComponent
ch.unibas.medizin.dynamicreports.design.base.component.DRDesignHyperlinkComponent
ch.unibas.medizin.dynamicreports.design.base.chart.DRDesignChart
All Implemented Interfaces:
DRIDesignChart, DRIDesignComponent, DRIDesignHyperLinkComponent, Serializable
public class DRDesignChart extends DRDesignHyperlinkComponent implements DRIDesignChart

DRDesignChart class.

Ricardo Mariaca
